mapper.insert: insert into board(subject, context, userID, writedate, season, thumbnail, addrtitle, lat, lng) values(#{subject}, #{context}, #{userID}, now(), #{season}, #{thumbnail}, #{addrtitle}, #{lat}, #{lng});
mapper.select: select a.no, a.subject, a.context, a.hit, a.userID, a.thumbnail, a.writedate, a.season, a.addrtitle, a.lat, a.lng, b.username from board AS a inner join user as b on a.userID = b.userID where a.no=#{param1};
mapper.update: update board set hit= hit+1 where no=${param1}
